title: Gear Aid Explorer Field Repair Kit Outdoor Camping Survival Emergency - Small
description:
Seal seams and patch holes during any adventure with the Seam Grip WP Field Repair Kit. Seam Grip WP permanently bonds to fabrics including nylon and canvas, so it’s ideal for repairing tents, tarps, awnings and other outdoor gear. More than a tent seam sealer, this flexible adhesive cures to a waterproof seal that won’t peel or crack. This compact kit also includes two round 3” Tenacious Tape Repair Patches. Just peel-and-stick patches for a faster repair for sleeping pads, backpacks and more. Keep gear failures under control with the Seam Grip WP Field Repair Kit.

Gear Aid Explorer Field Repair Kit Outdoor Camping Survival Emergency - Small

Seal seams and patch holes during any adventure with the Seam Grip WP Field Repair Kit. Seam Grip WP permanently bonds to fabrics including nylon and canvas, so it’s ideal for repairing tents, tarps, awnings and other outdoor gear. More than a tent seam sealer, this flexible adhesive cures to a waterproof seal that won’t peel or crack. This compact kit also includes two round 3” Tenacious Tape Repair Patches. Just peel-and-stick patches for a faster repair for sleeping pads, backpacks and more. Keep gear failures under control with the Seam Grip WP Field Repair Kit.

Key Features

  • Seal seams and repair holes permanently in nylon tents, tarps, awnings and outdoor gear like sleeping pads and inflatables; use at home or in the field
  • Use Seam Grip WP to make seals waterproof, which cures to a flexible rubber seal that won’t peel or crack over time
  • Patch pinhole leaks with peel-and-stick patches and an adhesive that bonds to outdoor fabrics including nylon, polyester, canvas and vinyl
  • Bring this handy kit on any adventure; includes Seam Grip WP sealant and adhesive (0.25 oz), two 3” Tenacious Tape Patches (clear and black nylon) and applicator brush
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MCN10591-BRK
  • UPC: 066510468006
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Small
